title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
